name: ggu-ai-document-agent
description: GGU AI Autonomous Word Document Processing Agent

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix frontend-react && npm install --prefix electron-app && cd backend && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install pyinstaller
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:electron

author: S GGU AI KUMAR SWAMY
